1.name: Zhiwei Zhang
1.title: Arbitrary orientations of cycles in oriented graphs
1.abstract: We show that every sufficiently large oriented graph $$G$$ with minimum indegree and outdegree both at least $(3|V(G)|-1)/8$ contains every orientation of a Hamilton cycle. This result improves the approximate bound established by Kelly and resolves a long-standing problem posed by H"aggkvist and Thomason in 1995. The degree condition is tight and it can be improved to $(3|V(G)|-4)/8$ for Hamilton cycles that are nearly directed, generalizing a classic result by Keevash, K"uhn and Osthus. Additionally, we derive a pancyclicity result for arbitrary orientations. More precisely, the above  degree condition suffices to guarantee the existence of cycles of every possible orientation and every possible length unless $G$ is isomorphic to one of the exceptional  oriented graphs.
1.bio: Zhiwei Zhang, a PhD in Shandong University, he is intersted in digraphs and decompostion.

2.name: 李四
2.title: 代数组合与对称函数
2.abstract: 对称函数在表示论与组合学中具有重要地位。本报告将介绍 Schur 函数、Jack 函数的最新恒等式，并给出一个基于分区组合的证明。
2.bio: 李四，山东大学副研究员，研究兴趣包括代数组合、对称函数和组合 Hopf 代数。

3.name: 王五
3.title: 随机图与相位转移
3.abstract: 考虑 Erdős–Rényi 随机图 $G(n,p)$，当 $p = \frac{\ln n}{n}$ 时出现巨分支。我们证明了一个关于连通性的精确阈值。
3.bio: 王五，博士后，研究随机图、随机过程。
